text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you went that far into the mountains by
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the weather and the skies were just so
pleasant. I drifted along with the breeze, and
found myself quite far from the school.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: A-amazing! So how did you get back?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I was guided by the comforting breeze and the
clouds themselves.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I can see that! I had a similar experience
before!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Bakushin O! You can read the wind and the
clouds? H-how do you do it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It was when I was still small and cute as a button. I
heard about the "first storm of spring," and
couldn't take my mind off that beginning part.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't possibly let anyone besides me be
crowned as "first" anything!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So I took off running in the direction of those
winds, and before I knew it, I was in some far-off
town!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
It's so easy to get swept away in a gale, isn't it?
They have carried me across mountains before.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You talk as if that's a common occurrence... I
never knew the wind was so powerful...
